description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a predominantly black upper with vibrant green accents on the laces, collar lining, and side detailing. The shoes have a white sole with a slightly raised heel and a rounded toe box, providing a sporty and casual look. On the tongue, there is a prominent logo patch with text and a graphic, while the outer side panels display a circular emblem. The heel area is reinforced and also features a logo, adding to the visual interest and brand identity. The shoes are constructed with visible stitching and layered panels, suggesting durability and comfort for urban activities. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for everyday wear in city environments.
description: A pair of black and green low-top athletic sneakers with white soles, featuring prominent logos and vibrant green laces. The design is sporty, modern, and well-suited for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, green laces, and logo patch on the tongue.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green side detailing, circular emblem, and layered panel construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reinforced heel and a logo on the back of each shoe.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with green accents and the circular emblem visible, mirroring the other side.
attribute_logo: Circular emblem on the side panels, graphic and text logo patch on the tongue, and a logo on the heel; all in white or gray.
